seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Personal AI productivity suite (email, docs, calendar) built via vibe coding; sets new DIY benchmark for Knowledge Work Agents, achieving >10k stars in a day and topping HN.
Described as the 'Full Self-Driving' moment for AI Engineering, enabling advanced agent evaluation and orchestration.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Open source AI progress in China
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: 1.5B users driving rapid model improvements focused on practical use vs. US token maxxing and hallucinations; highlights open-source momentum.
Agent autonomously finds MP4s, verifies codec/fps/resolution, stitches without re-encoding, decodes and spot-checks transitions—showcasing advanced file handling and agentic capabilities.
First open-weights model combining frontier coding/agentic (59% SWE-Bench Pro), 1M context via sparse attention, and native multimodality from step zero; weights/report in ~10 days.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Evaluating Deep Agents with LangSmith on AWS
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Blog on datapoint/evaluator design for longer-horizon agents, advancing practical benchmarking and evaluation frameworks.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Repo turns workflows into agent skills for 14+ tools via single SKILL.md file; enables modular multi-agent systems for local or cloud deployment.

global_discoveries.project: Onshape + NVIDIA Isaac Sim multi-agent workflow
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Multi-agent orchestration auto-handles CAD geometry, physics, and materials prep for simulation; proof-of-concept for AI-driven robotics/CAD pipelines.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Affirmation of Langsmith as future for AI engineering workflows.
near_misses.reason: Repost/quote of seed expert content, low new technical detail.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Cron jobs + skills for reliable agent backups, prospecting, and UX testing vs. unreliable heartbeats.
near_misses.reason: Practical agent automation tips but not a new repo/framework release.

notes: Very limited high-signal technical posts in the 24h window from seeds (mostly commentary); global search yielded 2 solid repo/framework examples. Prioritized actionable innovations over general discussion. No results from most seed experts.
